---
about:
  template: trestles
  image: images/xavier.jpg
  image-shape: round
  links:
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/xavierclementegarcia

    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/xavier-clemente-garc%C3%ADa-cevallos-b4727a206/

    - text: '<img src="https://investigacion.udca.edu.co/wp-content/uploads/2018/04/cvlac.svg" style="height:20px;vertical-align:middle;"> CVLAC'
      href: https://scienti.minciencias.gov.co/cvlac/visualizador/generarCurriculoCv.do?cod_rh=0002018236

    - text: '<img src="https://upload.wikimedia.org/wikipedia/commons/0/06/ORCID_iD.svg" style="height:20px;vertical-align:middle;"> ORCID'
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-3284-2363

format:
  html:
    header-includes:
      - '<meta name="google-site-verification" content="h2lnvvhWpvnoK2cNWm9_9bdMCOZDnfvi_dNeRIm9GGM" />'
---

:::: {layout-ncol="2"}
::: right
---
subtitle: "Xavier Clemente García Cevallos"
---

¡Hello!

My name is Xavier Clemente García Cevallos. I'm currently studying a B.S Biology at the [University of Cauca](https://www.unicauca.edu.co/). I serving as the Development Biology and Neural Plasticity Research Seedbed Coordinator.
I have focused my work and skills on the field of computational and structural biology, as well as on understanding plant chemistry and drug discovery. I have been a monitor at the CAUP Herbarium of the University of Cauca and in the Department of Biology.
Currently, I am a member of the Latin American Association of Synthetic Biology (SynBio).

Welcome to my website.Let's have fun and learn together. 

:::
::::
